# Assurance Scorecard

Score each video before publishing and each mechanism after testing.

## Preflight score — 100 points

| Category | Points |
|---|---:|
| Topic classification clear | 10 |
| First frame legible without sound | 15 |
| Hook specific and tense | 15 |
| First payoff within target window | 10 |
| Text/captions reduce cognitive load | 10 |
| Proof/example/process visible | 10 |
| Story has change/progress | 10 |
| CTA matches natural action | 10 |
| Trust risk controlled | 5 |
| Naming/metric setup complete | 5 |

Interpretation:

```text
0–59: do not publish
60–74: weak test only
75–84: publishable
85–100: priority test
```

## Mechanism score — 100 points

| Category | Points |
|---|---:|
| Beats baseline on primary metric | 25 |
| Does not fail guardrail metric | 15 |
| Replicated in at least 3 executions | 20 |
| Works in at least 2 topics or surfaces | 15 |
| Has clear production template | 10 |
| Builds trust/follow potential | 10 |
| Search or portfolio durability | 5 |

Decision:

```text
0–49: kill
50–64: rewrite
65–79: replicate
80–89: scale carefully
90–100: core format candidate
```
